description: Composition:Pure leather brown office bag with yellow vertical stitches, ample space, separate pocket for mobile phone and two side pocketsA quintessential formal bag that can be used by corporate employees and teachers. The vertical yellow stitches lend an attractive spark to the bag, while the sturdy silver colour buckles holding the shoulder straps lend that stylish edge. With two separate chambers to hold essentials, once can divide their personal belongings and official material. A dedicated pocket to hold the mobile makes it all the more handy. It&rsquo s also a great weekend getaway bag for those who prefer to travel light.Bag careRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a mild leather cleaner
